scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target bundler --out-dir pkg/csv_parser target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/csv_parser.wasm && wasm-bindgen --target bundler --out-dir pkg/geo_wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/geo_wasm.wasm && wasm-bindgen --target bundler --out-dir pkg/text_utils_wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/text_utils_wasm.wasm
